name: Bill Bailey
bio: Bill Bailey is an English comedian, musician and actor known for whimsical, rambling stand-up that blends surreal jokes with live music. He is widely recognised for playing Manny in the sitcom Black Books and for panel-show appearances on Never Mind the Buzzcocks and QI. His touring shows such as Part Troll and Tinselworm cemented his reputation as a musical-comedy stylist.

timeline.ev: Channel 4 broadcasts the special Bill Bailey Live
Begins his role as Manny in the sitcom Black Books
Tours the acclaimed show Part Troll
Wins Strictly Come Dancing, becoming the shows oldest winner

accolades: Winner of Strictly Come Dancing (2020), the shows oldest winner
Long-running panellist on Never Mind the Buzzcocks and QI
Acclaimed for musical-comedy touring shows including Part Troll
